action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy is 89.15% from iter 12. Iterations 13-15 had 0 seconds (no commands run). predict.py has a critical typo (swpt_ckpt→swa_ckpt) and is truncated. train.py is also truncated. Analysis: Need to write complete, bug-free code and execute training. The current approach (dual ViT all-12-layer features, 3072-hidden MLP, feature standardization, NCM ensemble, MC dropout TTA, SWA) is sound. Decision: Write complete files with all improvements, run training for 500 epochs, then submit eval.
